name: Dell Latitude + XPS BIOS identifier family
description: Dell extends PCR 0 with an EV_S_CRTM_VERSION carrying the ASCII string `Dell Inc.' followed by a BIOS version like `1.22.0'. Unlike Lenovo, Dell's CRTM string is ASCII, not UTF-16.
platforms-note: Dell does not encode the model in CRTM_VERSION itself; the model is read from SMBIOS (EV_EFI_HANDOFF_TABLES2 measurements on PCR 1). Cross-correlate CRTM version with SMBIOS product-name to identify the platform.
notes: Dell's EK certificate chains to `Dell Inc. TPM2 Root CA' (cert available from https://www.dell.com/support/contents/drivers/driverdetails?driverid=7W5V2). SecureBoot db is populated with Dell's own secure-boot cert plus Microsoft UEFI CA.
source: Dell Latitude service manuals + observed /sys/firmware/dmi/entries tables on deployed Linux hosts.
